header.label: National Analytics
header.headline: 26.4 Cr students, 15.1 L schools — national picture 2020-21
header.sub: full_school_data gives school, teacher and PTR aggregates. Student_final_25 adds management breakdown. GPI 0.92 · PTR 27.3:1 · 70% PTR compliant · Govt 51%

cards.label: Total Schools
cards.headline: 15.1 L
cards.note: SUM · Rural 83% (12.6 L) · Urban 17% (2.5 L)

cards.label: Total Enrollment
cards.headline: 26.4 Cr
cards.note: GPI = 0.92. Female: 48% of enrollment. Rural students: 18.5 Cr (70%)

cards.label: Enrollment Funnel
cards.barLabel: 12.9 Cr in Secondary of 26.4 Cr total
cards.note: Secondary schools hold 49% of total enrollment. Foundational+Prep: 6.1 Cr, Middle: 7.5 Cr, Secondary: 12.9 Cr

cards.label: PTR Compliance
cards.note: / total_schools = 70%. National PTR = 27.3:1

2020-21.chartLevelSource: Foundational and Preparatory stages have the largest student base but the fewest secondary schools — creating a structural bottleneck as students move up the education ladder.
2020-21.chartLevelNote: Foundational+Prep 6.1 Cr · Middle 7.5 Cr · Secondary 12.9 Cr · total 26.4 Cr.
2020-21.chartCatSource: Secondary and Higher Secondary schools are under-represented relative to their student demand — one secondary school often serves students from multiple feeder upper-primary schools.
2020-21.chartCatNote: Foundational+Prep 51% · Middle 29% · Secondary 19% of 15.1 L total schools.

insight1.label: Students in Secondary Schools
insight1.note: Secondary schools enroll 12.9 Cr (49% of total 26.4 Cr) in 2020-21. Foundational+Prep: 6.1 Cr across 7.7 L schools. Secondary: 12.9 Cr across 2.9 L schools

insight2.label: National Gender Parity Index
insight2.note: SUM / SUM. GPI 0.92 means for every 100 boys, 92 girls enrolled. Female share: 48%
insight2.delta_label: Female enrollment share · 12.7 Cr girls enrolled
